{{CargoRelic
|name=Portable Cooking Set
|class_id=20925
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Roachiko designed this cooking set in order to eat delicious food anytime, anywhere. Despite the small size, the set comprises various cooking tools, including a kitchen knife, soup spoon, and rice cooker. It is not only sturdy and durable but also extremely lightweight, making it a favorite of Roachiko!
|fame=28
|art=16
|fth=12
|civ=16
|tech=18
|ss1=Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail HP +10<br>Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail RUSH +1<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300
|ss2=Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail HP +20<br>Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail RUSH +2<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300
|ss3=Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail HP +30<br>Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail RUSH +3<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300
|ss4=Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail HP +30<br>Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail RUSH +3<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300
|ss7=Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail HP +30<br>Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail RUSH +3<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300<br> (Awakened)
}}
